zh.Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特查爾頓 麥可雷爾
zh.Lytes Cary, Charlton Mackrell, Somerset,: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特查爾頓 麥可雷爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter Lyte於大約1305年出生在英國薩默塞特查爾頓 麥可雷爾時，他的父親Robert Lyte29歲，母親Margaret Goathurst37歲。他於1330年與Agnes de Bloomfield在英國薩默塞特查爾頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1348年在他的家鄉享年44歲。

zh-hans.Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特查爾頓 麥可雷爾
zh-hans.Lytes Cary, Charlton Mackrell, Somerset,: 英国英格兰薩默塞特查爾頓 麥可雷爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter Lyte于大约1305年出生在英国薩默塞特查爾頓 麥可雷爾时，他的父亲Robert Lyte29岁，母亲Margaret Goathurst37岁。他于1330年与Agnes de Bloomfield在英国薩默塞特查爾頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1348年在他的家乡享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lyte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Light
meanings: English: from Middle English liht ‘light, active’ (Old English lēoht).
English: topographic name from Middle English liht, leht ‘light’ (Old English lēoht), used for a ‘light place, clearing, glade’.
English: nickname from Middle English lit ‘little’ (Old English lȳt). Compare Little .

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter Lyte was born about 1305, in Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, England, his father, Robert Lyte, was 29 and his mother, Margaret Goathurst, was 37. He married Agnes de Bloomfield in 1330, in Charlton, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1348, in his hometown, at the age of 44.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter Lyteが約1305年にイギリスソメルセトチャールトン マクレルで生まれた時，父Robert Lyteは29歳，母Margaret Goathurstは37歳であった。1330年にイギリスソメルセトチャールトンでAgnes de Bloomfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1348年に故郷で44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter Lyte(이)가 대략 1305년 영국 서머세트 찰턴 맥크렐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Lyte(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Goathurst(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1330년 영국 서머세트 찰턴에서 Agnes de Bloomfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1348년 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter Lyte родился около 1305 г. в местности чарлтон маккрелл, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Lyte было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Goathurst, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Bloomfield в 1330 г. в местности чарлтон, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1348 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет.
